blur.$description: Paired with the --cr-material-* tint tiers (see generated/css/tokens.css, appended post-build since they reference var(--cr-color-surface-tint) and must resolve against whichever theme is active) to build the backdrop-filter blur for each translucent tier. No 'none'/'ultra-thin' entry — none is unblurred and ultra-thin is intentionally a light tint with no blur at all, matching iOS's own thinnest material.
